reasoning: Yaar, this is simple for me. Shantanu delivered the CAA rules on March 31—four years we waited, and Modi and Shantanu finally made it real. My grandmother's application is in the queue right now. Biswajit Das keeps switching sides like a weather vane, and he's not even Matua—why should I trust him with what we need? Shantanu is one of us, he's a Union Minister now, and he's actually delivering for our community. Everything else—the scams, the heat, the politics—none of it matters compared to this. My family can finally apply for citizenship papers.
primary_drivers: CAA rules notified on March 31, 2024—the one thing I've been waiting for since 2019
Shantanu Thakur as Matua leader and Union Minister who delivered this
My grandmother's citizenship application is now in motion
